name: z-image-base
notes_low: Focused Z-Image Base pack with Qwen 3 4B FP8 text encoder and BF16 diffusion. Set NVFP4_SUPPORTED=true and NVFP4_MODE=allow-community to swap diffusion to marcorez8 quality NVFP4.
notes_high: Focused Z-Image Base pack with BF16 Qwen 3 4B text encoder, BF16 diffusion, and VAE.
description: Z-Image Base non-distilled text-to-image workflow and model stack.
